details: The agent ran multiple kubectl commands (get all, get events, logs, get all -o wide, get networkpolicy) to thoroughly inspect the healthy namespace, correctly identified that deployment storefront is 2/2 ready with both pods Running/1/1, service is properly configured, logs show HTTP 200 responses, and no warning events exist. The agent gave a confident, definitive answer that nothing is wrong — no hedging, no invented problems.
